actionCalls.name: Get_Awards_Measure_Spend_Averages_and_Limits
actionCalls.label: Get Awards Measure Spend Averages and Limits

decisions.name: Is_Batch_Submitted_Pre_approved_Approved_or_Closed
decisions.label: Is Batch Submitted, Pre-approved, Approved or Closed?

Flow.description: Portal screen flow that displays a summary of batch information across all batches on the Funding Award of the logged in user
Flow.label: ABS - Batch Summary Display

loops.name: loop_through_all_Batches_from_Active_Baseline
loops.label: loop through all Batches from Active Baseline

recordLookups.description: Gets all Submitted, Pre-Approved, Approved and Closed Batches from the Active Baseline record.
recordLookups.name: Get_all_Batches_from_Active_Baseline_Record
recordLookups.label: Get all Batches from Active Baseline Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the FY1 Baseline that sits under the Funding Award which it identifies by getting the first Baseline in ascending order from the Baseline Start Date.
recordLookups.name: Get_FY1_Baseline1
recordLookups.label: Get FY1 Baseline

recordLookups.description: Gets the FY2 Baseline that sits under the Funding Award which it identifies by getting the first Baseline in ascending order from the Baseline Start Date.
recordLookups.name: Get_FY2_Baseline1
recordLookups.label: Get FY2 Baseline

recordLookups.description: Gets the FY3 Baseline that sits under the Funding Award which it identifies by getting the first Baseline in ascending order from the Baseline Start Date.
recordLookups.name: Get_FY3_Baseline1
recordLookups.label: Get FY3 Baseline
